agentInstructions: Phase 4: adopt persona **compliance-officer** (regulatory-audit) — read https://github.com/gtcx-ecosystem/gtcx-docs/blob/main/docs/governance/institutional/personas/compliance-officer.md
Include **Active persona** + **Frame** in Proceed Brief and Status Update (P26).
Execution bout is provisioned — drain Class R stories in `stories[]` before bout check-in.
After each story: micro-commit, update session.md row, re-run `pnpm agent:next-work`.
Progress Status Update in chat every 2 completed stories (short Done bullets).
Do NOT end the session after one story while `remainingCount` > 0.
Do NOT ask operator to pick stories — P22 selects head; bout lists the drain queue.
Full Status Update + optional push only at bout check-in.
Normative: docs/operations/agent-execution-bout.md
Bout plan empty for Class R — check-in with humanOnly as Approval needed; witness only.
DTF-5.5.2 = Class R — run certified-pack commands in-session; never list 5.5.2 under Approval needed.
DTF-5.5.4 = Class S only — LOI/regulator letter; agents witness, do not sign.
Use executionBout: drain Class R stories before bout check-in — no stop after one story.
Do not ask the operator which story or repo to pick.
Witness: docs/operations/coordination/from-gtcx-core-tier5-commercial-unblock-2026-06-06.md
Emit progress Status Updates during bout; ONE full check-in Status Update when bout completes.

northStar.outcome: Finish foundation evidence and coordination so downstream apps (markets, intelligence, infrastructure) can launch — GTM closes GR-T2+ sovereign deals.
